photocatalyst.name: Ir(dFCF3ppy)2(bpy)PF6
photocatalyst.role: photoredox catalyst for single electron transfer

chemistry.scope_summary: Various cycloalkyl substituted 7-azaindoles were synthesized including 2-, 3-, 4-, 5-, and 6-regioisomers. Cycloalkyl groups included cyclobutyl, cyclopentyl, cyclohexyl, cycloheptyl, THP, and substituted variants. Yields ranged from 17-71% in continuous flow conditions.

optimization_table.key_findings: Light source A = 2 × 26 W CFL; light source B = 6 × 4 W blue LED gave best results

figures.key_information: This is a chemical reaction scheme showing a photoredox catalyzed cross-coupling reaction, not a reactor/flow setup schematic. The reaction uses Ir(dFCF3ppy)2bpy.PF6 photocatalyst (2.5 mol %), NiCl2-dme/dtbbpy (12 mol %), 2,6-lutidine (1.5 equiv), 24 W blue LED (450 nm) irradiation, DMA:dioxane (1:4) solvent system, 40 min residence time in continuous flow conditions.
figures.caption: Figure 1. Examples of drugs containing 7-azaindoles. | Scheme 1. Introduction of Cycloalkyl Groups to 7-Azaindole Using a Conventional Two-Step Method

notable_failures: 3h with both light sources A and B (trace yields)

figures.key_information: This is not a reactor/flow setup schematic - it is a chemical reaction scheme showing a photocatalytic cross-coupling reaction with reactants, catalysts, conditions, and products

figures.flow_path: reagents mixed, then fed to photoreactor, then to collection
figures.key_information: Flow rate 0.25 mL/min, 40 min residence time, Blue LED at 450 nm, reagents in DMA:dioxane (1:4) solvent system

translation_logic.batch_limitation: Long reaction times (24 hours) using CFL light source with lower efficiency
translation_logic.flow_advantage: Dramatic time reduction (40 minutes residence time) with improved yield using blue LED irradiation and optimized solvent system
translation_logic.what_changed: Light source (CFL to blue LED), solvent (THF to DMA:dioxane 1:4), reaction time (1440 min to 40 min), setup (batch to continuous flow)
translation_logic.safety_improvement: Continuous flow operation under N2 atmosphere provides better safety profile

figure_descriptions: Reactor scheme showing flow setup with reagent inlets, mixer, coiled photoreactor with external blue LED, and collection flask
Multiple scope tables showing substrate tolerance and yield ranges
Chemical reaction schemes showing mechanism and conditions

conflicts: Scope table yield ranges differ between tables (14-69% vs 17-70%)
Some catalyst loadings missing from pass 3 but found in figure analysis
notes: High confidence extraction with good coverage of key parameters. Some minor discrepancies in yield ranges between different scope tables. Catalyst loadings and base equivalents recovered from figure analysis. Time reduction factor calculated as 1440/40 = 36x improvement.
